dimensions.name: Git Forensic Analysis
dimensions.forensic_instruction: Run 'git log --oneline --reverse' on the cloned repository. Count the total number of commits. Check if the commit history tells a progression story: Environment Setup -> Tool Engineering -> Graph Orchestration.
dimensions.success_pattern: More than 3 commits showing clear progression from setup to tool engineering to graph orchestration.
dimensions.failure_pattern: Single 'init' commit or bulk upload of all code at once.

dimensions.name: State Management Rigor
dimensions.forensic_instruction: Scan for 'src/state.py' or equivalent state definitions. Use AST parsing to find classes inheriting from 'BaseModel' (Pydantic) or 'TypedDict'. Check for 'operator.add' and 'operator.ior' reducers.
dimensions.success_pattern: 'AgentState' uses TypedDict or BaseModel with Annotated reducers.
dimensions.failure_pattern: Plain Python dicts used for state. No Pydantic models. No reducers.

dimensions.name: Graph Orchestration Architecture
dimensions.forensic_instruction: Scan for 'StateGraph' builder instantiation. Use AST parsing to analyze 'builder.add_edge()'. Verify parallel fan-out/fan-in for Detectives and Judges.
dimensions.success_pattern: Two distinct parallel fan-out/fan-in patterns: one for Detectives, one for Judges.
dimensions.failure_pattern: Purely linear flow. No parallel branches. No synchronization node.

dimensions.name: Safe Tool Engineering
dimensions.forensic_instruction: Scan 'src/tools/' for repository cloning logic. Verify 'tempfile.TemporaryDirectory()' is used. Check for raw 'os.system()' calls.
dimensions.success_pattern: All git operations run inside 'tempfile.TemporaryDirectory()'. No raw 'os.system()' calls.
dimensions.failure_pattern: Raw 'os.system("git clone <url>")' drops code into live working directory.

dimensions.name: Structured Output Enforcement
dimensions.forensic_instruction: Scan Judge nodes in 'src/nodes/judges.py'. Verify LLMs use '.with_structured_output()' bound to 'JudicialOpinion' schema.
dimensions.success_pattern: All Judge LLM calls use '.with_structured_output(JudicialOpinion)'. Retry logic exists.
dimensions.failure_pattern: Judge nodes call LLMs with plain prompts and parse freeform text.

dimensions.name: Judicial Nuance and Dialectics
dimensions.forensic_instruction: Verify Prosecutor, Defense, and Tech Lead have distinct, conflicting system prompts. Check if prompts share more than 50% text.
dimensions.success_pattern: Three clearly distinct personas with conflicting philosophies.
dimensions.failure_pattern: Single agent acts as 'The Grader' or three judges share 90% of prompt text.

dimensions.name: Chief Justice Synthesis Engine
dimensions.forensic_instruction: Verify conflict resolution uses hardcoded deterministic Python logic. Check for security override, fact supremacy, dissent requirement rules.
dimensions.success_pattern: Deterministic Python if/else logic implementing named rules. Output is Markdown file.
dimensions.failure_pattern: ChiefJustice is just another LLM prompt that averages scores.

dimensions.name: Theoretical Depth (Documentation)
dimensions.forensic_instruction: Search PDF for: 'Dialectical Synthesis', 'Fan-In / Fan-Out', 'Metacognition', 'State Synchronization'. Check if terms appear in substantive explanations.
dimensions.success_pattern: Terms appear in detailed architectural explanations with implementation details.
dimensions.failure_pattern: Terms appear only in executive summary without connection to implementation.

dimensions.name: Report Accuracy (Cross-Reference)
dimensions.forensic_instruction: Extract file paths mentioned in PDF. Cross-reference against RepoInvestigator evidence. Build Verified Paths vs Hallucinated Paths lists.
dimensions.success_pattern: All file paths mentioned in report exist in repo. Zero hallucinated paths.
dimensions.failure_pattern: Report references files that do not exist. Claims contradict code evidence.

dimensions.name: Architectural Diagram Analysis
dimensions.forensic_instruction: Extract images from PDF. Classify diagram type. Check if it visualizes parallel split: Detectives -> Evidence Aggregation -> Judges -> Chief Justice.
dimensions.success_pattern: Diagram accurately represents StateGraph with clear parallel branches.
dimensions.failure_pattern: Generic box-and-arrow diagram with no indication of parallelism.

synthesis_rules.security_override: Confirmed security flaws cap total score at 3, overriding any effort points from Defense.
synthesis_rules.fact_supremacy: Forensic evidence (facts from Detectives) always overrules Judicial opinion.
synthesis_rules.functionality_weight: If Tech Lead confirms architecture is modular, this carries highest weight for Architecture criterion.
synthesis_rules.dissent_requirement: Chief Justice must summarize why Prosecutor and Defense disagreed. Every criterion with variance > 2 needs dissent explanation.
synthesis_rules.variance_re_evaluation: If score variance exceeds 2 for any criterion, trigger re-evaluation of specific evidence before rendering final score.
